allies.rationale_text: Base-rates helps statistics-concepts anchor judgments in background frequencies instead of vivid but misleading case details.
Correlation-vs-causation helps statistics-concepts distinguish pattern from mechanism when the team is tempted to jump from association to cause.
allies.source_quote: differentiate between events that are merely associated and those that are causally related

antagonists.rationale_text: Narratives can overpower statistics-concepts when emotionally compelling stories displace distributional reasoning and evidence weighting.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Statistics-concepts conflicts with narratives when raw statistical findings resist the narrative packaging needed for audience comprehension and action.
structured_tensions.source_quote: statistics-concepts conflicts with narratives (narratives) when raw statistical findings resist the narrative packaging needed for audience comprehension and action.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Statistics-concepts conflicts with simplification when statistical compression into headline numbers discards variance and distributional shape that inform the decision.
structured_tensions.source_quote: statistics-concepts conflicts with simplification (simplification) when statistical compression into headline numbers discards variance and distributional shape that inform the decision.

curation_notes.summary: The relation surface stays on base-rate and causality allies, with narrative drift preserved as the clearest bounded antagonist.
donor_drops: Did not widen into broader decision-theory neighbors because the raw source is stronger on signal, baselines, and story-versus-data tension.
open_questions: Game-theory-payoffs is a source-real ally, but base-rates and correlation-vs-causation were the cleaner first-order anchors.
